overview: A GST-compliant invoice generation app for grocery stores with multi-batch inventory, expiry management, customer tracking, barcode scanning, thermal printing, and admin panel for store management.
features: Batch detail column on product save screen
Default rate (cost) per product with auto-fetch in invoices
Customer purchase history view by mobile number
Configurable expiry threshold for batch stock alerts
Per-product profit margin report (cost vs MRP)
Batch detail in product export Excel
customerMobile stored in backend Invoice record
GST-compliant invoice printing with QR code and HSN-wise breakdown
